# growthbook_namespace (Data Source)

Look up an existing GrowthBook namespace by ID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Unique namespace identifier (e.g. `ns-...`).

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the namespace.
- `display_name` (String) Human-readable display name.
- `format` (String) Namespace format: `legacy` or `multiRange`.
- `hash_attribute` (String) The user attribute used for bucket hashing.
- `seed` (String) The seed used for bucket hashing.
- `status` (String) Namespace status: `active` or `inactive`.
